## Checklist

- [ ] I have targeted the `dev` branch, not `main`
- [ ] I have run `prettier --write "**/*.js"` on any changed JavaScript files
- [ ] I have run `npm test` in the `server` folder and all tests pass

- [ ] I have added a bullet point to `RELEASE_NOTES.md` describing my change
